code: import React,{useCallback,useEffect,useMemo,useState}from"react";import{fetchIssLocation}from"../common/api";import{IssContext}from"../common/context";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const POLL_INTERVAL_MS=5000;export function ThemeProvider(_ref){let{children}=_ref;const theme=useMemo(()=>({colors:{background:"#f7f9fc",card:"#ffffff",text:"#0f172a",muted:"#475569",border:"#dbe2ea"}}),[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{minHeight:"100vh",background:theme.colors.background,color:theme.colors.text,fontFamily:"Segoe UI, Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif"},children:children});}export function IssProvider(_ref2){let{children}=_ref2;const[position,setPosition]=useState(null);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState("");const[lastUpdated,setLastUpdated]=useState(null);const refresh=useCallback(async()=>{try{const data=await fetchIssLocation();setPosition({latitude:Number(data.latitude),longitude:Number(data.longitude)});setLastUpdated(new Date());setError("");}catch(err){setError(err.message||"Unable to load ISS location.");}finally{setLoading(false);}},[]);useEffect(()=>{refresh();const intervalId=setInterval(refresh,POLL_INTERVAL_MS);return()=>clearInterval(intervalId);},[refresh]);const contextValue=useMemo(()=>({position,loading,error,lastUpdated,refresh}),[position,loading,error,lastUpdated,refresh]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(IssContext.Provider,{value:contextValue,children:children});}export default function AppWrapper(_ref3){let{children}=_ref3;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("main",{style:{maxWidth:"980px",margin:"0 auto",padding:"20px"},children:children});}
